rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §38.001 governs student immunization requirements for school admission. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter and do not intersect.
quote: Each student shall be fully immunized against diphtheria, rubeola, rubella, mumps, tetanus, and poliomyelitis, except as provided by Subsection (c).
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and school immunization statute.
